title: validation-contract.json
description: Per-module assertions split by validator type. Locked at end of Phase 2.

module.description: Which module this assertion belongs to. Matches a module id in modules.json.

description.description: What to verify. Concrete, testable. e.g. 'a POST to /signup with valid input creates exactly one row in users and returns 201 with the user's id'.

evidence_required.description: What evidence the validator should produce (test name, screenshot, log excerpt, sensor reading). Optional but recommended.
